title: Phase 2.3 — Pin OpenClaw Gateway image by digest (declined 2026-04-20)
summary: Decision to keep the date-shaped :2026.4.14 tag for the OpenClaw Gateway image instead of pinning by SHA256 digest.
notes: Filed under docs/retrospectives/ but content is a self-contained decision record with Decision/Rationale/Revisit-trigger structure and a locked outcome (declined). Classified as ADR per the decision-content signal rather than the retrospectives/ path.
